productName: BFF Besties Infused Preroll 2-Pack - OMG - Orange Melon Gum - 1.5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Orange Melon Gum flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a sweet, juicy orange flavor, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
